fundamentals.summary: U.S. federal holidays observed by the federal government, 2026-2028 inclusive. ISO-8601 dates in America/New_York reference. Use for calendar UIs, scheduling, business-day arithmetic.
fundamentals.license_note: U.S. federal holiday schedule is public record (OPM).

fundamentals.summary: UK bank holidays (England and Wales), 2026-2028 inclusive. ISO-8601 dates in Europe/London reference. Scotland and Northern Ireland would land as separate ids when a consumer needs them.
fundamentals.license_note: UK bank holiday schedule is public record (gov.uk).

_notes: Fifth fundamental category (spec §8 dates-and-holidays). Shipped 2026-05-14. v1 ships us-federal + uk-bank (2026-2028). Cadence: yearly content refresh (a v2 will extend the year range). Future: religious-observances-multi, lunar-calendar, additional countries by request. Skill surface (builtin.holidays.between, builtin.holidays.next) and runtime_global deferred.
